content.en:
"I'll give you some True Dragon Blood Golden Stones, no problem!"

Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor agreed.

Ye Tian didn't ask for the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone, he naturally didn't care.

If Ye Tian asked him for the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone, he would hesitate!

"Endless Great Ancestor, come with me!"

Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor left here with Ye Tian.

Time passed slowly, and finally they reached their destination.

"Endless Great Ancestor, this is it, we agreed to meet here, the others shouldn't have come yet, wait a minute!" Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Anyway, he has a lot of time and is not in a hurry.

After a long time, two Heavenly Ancestors finally came.

Then three more Heavenly Ancestors came one after another, and the personnel were all there.

There are a total of six Heavenly Ancestors, one of whom is at the Boundary Breaking Level, which is equivalent to the combat power of seven Heavenly Ancestors.

At this time, Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor said: "Everyone, it should be the seven of us, the other Heavenly Ancestors either haven't encountered it, or they are unwilling to take risks, so let's set off now!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian and they answered.

......

Somewhere in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm.

A true dragon inhabits a cavern here, with no other creatures around.

Whew!!

One figure after another appeared here, and it was Ye Tian and them.

"That's it, we have to strike quickly, no one should hide the means, and kill the real dragon as quickly as possible. As for the resources here, they are also collected as quickly as possible. Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

The Heavenly Ancestors responded.

"Do it!"

The six Heavenly Ancestors and Ye Tian instantly entered the cave, saw the true dragon that was comparable to the powerful Heavenly Ancestor level, and then immediately made a move.

They didn't spare their hands, and they sacrificed weapons and various means to suppress and seal the void, and attacked this true dragon with all their might.

Ye Tian also performed the Pole Technique, and the terrifying Pole Light pierced through.

These six Heavenly Ancestors were really surprised when they saw Ye Tian's extreme technique, but now was not the time to be surprised, they didn't stop at all and continued to attack.

Thundered!!!!

The battle broke out!

In just an instant, the true dragon was injured.

"Damn outsiders, how dare you attack the great Mio Dragon!"

The true dragon roared.

However.

Its roar didn't stop Ye Tian in the slightest, but instead attacked more violently.

In a few moments, the scales of its whole body were torn, and its body was pierced, and it was already severely damaged.

"Die!"

"Die!"

"Die!"

The Heavenly Ancestors unleashed their most powerful means of attack, completely erasing the last of this true dragon's life.

Immediately, Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor began to put away this true dragon.

The other Heavenly Ancestors began to collect the resources of this true dragon, leaving no resources behind.

"Hurry up, it won't be long before other True Dragons will come over!" Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor urged.

Now.

Ye Tian is mining, there is a vein of true dragon blood gold stone here, the vein is not very large, but there are also tens of thousands of true dragon blood gold stones.

Soon, Ye Tianjiang took away the tens of thousands of true dragon blood gold stone veins.

And the other Heavenly Ancestors have almost all collected the resources here.

"Let's go!"

Whew!!

One Heavenly Ancestor after another fled.

After a while, nine true dragons shuttled over from a distant place, and when they saw the tragic situation here, they were immediately furious and began to look for traces of the murderer.

However, these Heavenly Ancestors have erased their traces and have not collided head-on with these True Dragons, so the chances of the True Dragons finding them are very low.

However, these true dragons knew about the existence of the alien Heavenly Ancestor, and once they found the Heavenly Ancestor, they would definitely be besieged by the Heavenly Ancestor.

So.

Xingchen Heavenly Ancestors, they also notified the other Heavenly Ancestors who did not come, asking them to be careful during this time.

......

"Now let's start distributing the benefits!"

Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Yes!"

The other Heavenly Ancestors nodded.

Immediately, they began to allocate all the resources they had gotten.

Even the true dragon blood, Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor took it out and distributed it.

And Ye Tian said before that he didn't want the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone, nor the True Dragon Blood, he only wanted the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone, so all the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone obtained this time belonged to him.

However, other resources, he could not make allocation.

He is also very satisfied with this.

After a while, these Heavenly Ancestors were all allocated.

"Everyone, it is recommended to leave the True Dragon Realm Ruins during this time and come back after a while. If those true dragons are lazy, even if they are angry now, after a while, they will all run to sleep, and then they will be safe!"

"I see!"

"I'm ready to leave, too!"

"Hahaha, Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor is right!"

These Heavenly Ancestors said one by one.

Whoa!!

In the blink of an eye, these Heavenly Ancestors had disappeared.

Ye Tian is going to go out for a trip, send the resources on his body out, and then turn back to the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

Immediately, he used the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order to go out from the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

Then, he returned these resources to another replica body, and re-entered the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian's copy body is ready to fuse the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone that has just arrived, to see if he can fuse the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone.

"Fusion!"

Pieces of True Dragon Blood Golden Stones began to fuse together, and as more and more True Dragon Blood Golden Stones were fused, they finally transformed into True Dragon Blood Golden Stones.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was very excited, with the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone, he could try to integrate the Infinite Divine Power Technique into his whole body and impact the Heavenly Ancestor Realm.

"Hahaha, Xingchen Heavenly Ancestor They want to turn the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone into a True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone, and they have to pour the True Dragon Blood Blood Golden Stone into the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone to accelerate the evolution and transformation of the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone, it will definitely take a long time, and I can easily fuse the True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he fused all the True Dragon Blood Golden Stones in his hand into True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones.

In the end, he had more than a thousand True Dragon Blood Chalcedony Stones in his hand.

Next, he prepared to extract the true dragon blood marrow fluid from the True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone.

Soon, drops of True Dragon Blood Marrow Fluid were extracted from the True Dragon Blood Marrow Stone.

As time passed, there was more and more True Dragon Blood Marrow in his hands.

"So much true dragon blood marrow fluid should be enough for me to break through!"

Ye Tian thought.

Right now, he had a few choices, which immeasurable magic technique to use to break through.

Those ordinary top-notch immeasurable magic powers, he definitely had no interest.

Ten arms with a golden body, a blade to kill the sky, and the art of the pole.

He needed to choose one of these three immeasurable powers.

"Let's choose the Pole Technique, although this Infinite Divine Power Technique will be very dangerous to integrate into the whole body, and it may fall, but once I break through with the Pole Technique, my strength will increase the most, and I am not short of True Dragon Blood Marrow Fluid, there are enough opportunities for trial and error!" Ye Tian thought to himself.
